def negative_async_lock_held_across_await():
    rule_id = "async_lock_held_across_await"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Async lock scopes or explicit acquire/release regions that continue across unrelated await points."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
